# H3 Master

> Unofficial web PWA companion app for Heroes of Might & Magic III: The Board Game (Archon Studio). Reference for all rules, scenarios, units, heroes, towns, artifacts, spells. AI Game Master answers rule questions with citations. Bilingual EN/RU.

## Site

- Site: https://h3master.app
- Sitemap: https://h3master.app/sitemap.xml
- Languages: English, Russian

## Core sections

- [Rules](https://h3master.app/rules): 271 rules across game phases (setup, turns, combat, towns, FAQ)
- [Scenarios](https://h3master.app/scenarios): 61 scenarios across 10 mission books, with setup, story, victory conditions, timed events
- [Heroes](https://h3master.app/heroes): 65 heroes (Castle, Rampart, Tower, Inferno, Necropolis, Dungeon, Stronghold, Fortress, Conflux, Cove) with specialties, stats, level abilities
- [Units](https://h3master.app/units): 241 unit cards (Few, Pack, Neutral variants)
- [Towns](https://h3master.app/towns): 10 town factions with buildings and dwellings
- [Decks](https://h3master.app/decks): artifacts, spells, abilities, war machines, statistics
- [Map Elements](https://h3master.app/map-elements): map locations, glyphs, Pandora's Box
- [Global Events](https://h3master.app/events): events, Astrologers Proclaim, AI cards, Morale cards
- [AI Game Master](https://h3master.app/ai): RAG chat with rule citations
- [Game Setup](https://h3master.app/game-setup): partition setup wizard, 5 modes (Clash, Campaign, Co-op, Alliance, Solo)

## Legal

- [About](https://h3master.app/about)

## Disclaimer

Unofficial fan-made companion. Not affiliated with Ubisoft Entertainment or Archon Studio.
